home.title: Math Trainer
home.subtitle: Pick a game and start playing!

multiplesCatcher.title: Multiples Catcher
multiplesCatcher.description: Catch falling balls in the right slot! Is the number a multiple of the slot number?

newWays.title: New Ways
newWays.description: Navigate from corner to corner — but never repeat a sequence of moves!

feedTheNumbers.title: Feed the Numbers
feedTheNumbers.description: Shoot balls into the hungry numbers! Score bonus points when matching digits appear.

hud.hint: — shoot up to feed a hungry number —
— drop the ball in the right slot —
